{{CargoRelic
|name=Anthology of Love Letters
|class_id=20624
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Tailor-made for love novices, this anthology of romantic letters serves as a guide. It contains confessions from historical figures and renowned figures alike, as well as a compilation of famous love letters from around the world. Readers are guaranteed to gain insights into the realm of love.
|fame=14
|art=33
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +4<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +7<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +10<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +10<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per partner you have, Snail ATK +10<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
